---
title: "Mater thesis"
author: "Tone Varberg Sabri"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```
